wishlistBtn.loginNeeded: Please log in to save to wishlist

footer.campaignNone: No active campaigns at the moment.
footer.description: ArahInn is an integrated platform that makes it easy to plan your trip and meet your daily needs. From accommodation bookings and transportation tickets to other supporting services — all designed to deliver a practical, safe, and trusted experience. With competitive prices and curated options, ArahInn is your reliable partner every step of the way.
footer.flightDescription: ArahInn is a flight booking service that connects you with a wide range of domestic and international airlines. Enjoy competitive fares, flexible schedules, and a fast, secure, and trusted booking process. Every transaction comes with an official e-ticket and dedicated customer support, making your air travel easier and more comfortable from search to departure.
footer.pelniDescription: ArahInn is a PELNI sea ticket booking service that makes your sea travel to ports across Indonesia easier. Enjoy a fast, secure, and trusted e-ticket booking process, complete with schedule details, cabin classes, and sea travel terms — so your voyage is more comfortable from booking to departure.
footer.keretaDescription: ArahInn is an official train ticket booking service in partnership with PT KAI, connecting you to a wide range of routes and departure schedules across Indonesia. Choose Executive, Business, or Economy class and even pick your seat number. Enjoy a fast, secure, and trusted e-ticket booking process, complete with schedule details and KAI travel terms — making your train journey more comfortable from search to departure.
footer.interiorDescription: ArahInn is an integrated ecosystem platform (superapp) for accommodation, ticket booking, travel, and lifestyle services, developed under one synergy group together with PT Wiraky Graha Indonesia.

profilePage.payStep3: Pick a bank, the system generates a VA number.

profilePage.wishlistDevNote: The Wishlist feature is under development
profilePage.whatIsWishlistDesc: Save your favorite hotels & properties to access later. Great for holiday plans or properties you want to track for price & availability.

profilePage.wlFeat1Desc: Add to wishlist directly from a hotel or property card.
profilePage.wlFeat2Desc: Get notified when your favorite hotel has a promo.
profilePage.wlFeat3Desc: Save properties for sale or rent to consider later.
profilePage.careSubtitle: Contact us or set your account preferences.
profilePage.faq1Q: How do I book a room?
profilePage.faq1A: Pick a hotel → choose dates & room → checkout → pay via Virtual Account.
profilePage.faq2Q: How do I cancel a booking?
profilePage.faq2A: Open My Orders → select the booking → click Cancel. Refunds follow the hotel's policy.
profilePage.faq3Q: How long until payment is verified?
profilePage.faq3A: VA payments are auto-verified within 1–2 minutes after transfer.
profilePage.faq4Q: How do I change my stay dates?
profilePage.faq4A: Open the booking detail → Reschedule. Available for bookings with Confirmed status.
profilePage.aboutDesc: An integrated platform for accommodation, transportation, and travel activities in Indonesia. Here to make your trips easier with the best prices from thousands of hotel & property partners.

travel.payStep4: 4. This page updates automatically — no confirmation needed.

ppob.noTrxDesc: Start with Mobile Credit, PLN Token, or E-Wallet Top-Up.
ppob.plnTokenAvailable: PLN Token available — Tap to view
ppob.plnMeterHint: The meter number is usually printed on the kWh meter or a previous PLN receipt (11 digits).
ppob.plnNoProductsDesc: Try again or choose another service type.
ppob.transferExactInfo: Transfer exactly {{amount}} (including the 3-digit unique code {{code}}) so admin can verify faster.
ppob.payInstr1: Transfer exactly {{amount}} to the account above.
ppob.payInstr2: Use the same single account so the system detects it quickly.
ppob.payInstr3: Admin verifies the bank transfer (1-15 min during work hours, longer outside work hours).
ppob.payInstr4: Once verified, the credit/token will be sent to {{number}}.
ppob.paidNoConfirm: Already transferred? No confirmation needed. The status updates automatically once admin verifies the transfer.
ppob.modeUnsupported: Payment mode {{mode}} is not yet supported for PPOB. Please contact admin.
ppob.plnInputTitle: How to Enter the Token into the PLN Meter
ppob.plnInput1: Enter the 20-digit token above on your PLN meter keypad.
ppob.plnInput3: Wait until the meter shows "Success" and the kWh increases.
ppob.plnInput4: If the meter shows "Wrong Token", check the numbers and try again.
ppob.tipPulsa: 💡 Check your credit with *888# or via your provider's SMS.
ppob.tipEwallet: 💡 Open your e-wallet app to see the latest balance.
ppob.tipGame: 💡 Diamonds/voucher are added automatically to the linked game account.
ppob.refundNote: Funds will be refunded by admin to the sender's account. Please wait — it takes 1-2 business days.

accountDeletion.seoDesc: How to delete your ArahInn account and personal data. Full guide, types of data deleted, and data retention terms per Indonesian regulations.
accountDeletion.heroSubtitle: You have the right to request deletion of your account and personal data at any time. Here is the complete guide.
accountDeletion.notice1: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
accountDeletion.notice2: Your Loyalty Points balance will be forfeited once the account is deleted.
accountDeletion.notice3: Active bookings (pending payment / not yet checked out) cannot be deleted until completed or canceled.
accountDeletion.notice4: You must create a new account if you want to use ArahInn again in the future.
accountDeletion.step1Desc: Send an account deletion request email to the address below, with subject: "ArahInn Account Deletion Request".
accountDeletion.step2Desc: Include the ArahInn account email you want to delete + reason (optional). We may ask for additional verification for security.
accountDeletion.step3Desc: Our team will verify account ownership and process the request within 7 business days. A confirmation will be sent to your email.
accountDeletion.step4Desc: Once verification is complete, your account and personal data will be deleted according to the retention terms below.
accountDeletion.sendToHint: One of the contacts below. Our team responds within 1×24 business hours.
accountDeletion.dataDeletedIntro: When the request is approved, the following data will be permanently deleted from our system:
accountDeletion.del6: Push notification tokens and device ID
accountDeletion.ret1Reason: Tax audit obligations & consumer protection under Law No. 8 of 1999 (Consumer Protection Law) and Law No. 28 of 2007 (General Provisions and Tax Procedures).
accountDeletion.ret2Reason: Financial document retention obligations under Tax Law.
accountDeletion.ret3Reason: Reviews will be anonymized (name replaced with "ArahInn User") but the review content remains displayed to help other users.
accountDeletion.ret4Reason: For fraud detection, security incident investigation, and audit logs.
accountDeletion.commitmentText: ArahInn is committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection (PDP Law). Account deletion requests are processed free of charge. If you have any questions, we're ready to help via the contacts above.

interior.feat1Desc: Space concepts tailored to your property's character and needs.
interior.feat2Desc: Crafted by experienced interior designers and skilled artisans.
interior.feat3Desc: Premium materials with assurance of finish and long-term durability.

interior.brandIntro: PT Wiraky Graha Indonesia oversees the Dekorasi.Me brand, specializing in custom interior design, furniture production, and building renovation.
interior.brandQuestion: Want your property to look stunning, or dreaming of your ideal space?
interior.brandAnswer: Dekorasi.Me is ready to make it happen with custom interior design and premium renovation services.
interior.brandClosing: Explore the world with ArahInn, build your dream space with Dekorasi.Me!
